assertions.title: Core flow - approval approve path works end-to-end

steps.action: Run targeted Playwright test for approve-path assertion
steps.observed: Targeted test passed: validates approval approve path completes with expected output evidence

steps.action: Verify explicit post-approval completion/output checks in spec
steps.expected: Spec asserts more than control disappearance
steps.observed: Spec asserts approve/deny controls removed, denied state absent, card contains e2e_requires_approval, expanded output shows E2E approval, and chat submit remains visible
Trace artifact generated for targeted pass run

terminalOutput: ✓ [chromium] artifact-approval.e2e.ts:150:3 validates approval approve path completes with expected output evidence
evidence.testDiscovery: npx playwright test tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts --list => Total: 4 tests in 1 file, includes approve-path case at line 150
networkSignals: Runtime event log includes RunContinued after approval

passedAssertions.reason: Targeted approve-path Playwright test passed and includes explicit completion/output assertions after approval

frictions.description: Backend log emitted non-blocking noise (e.g., 'Function e2e_requires_approval not found') during run despite passing assertion.
frictions.resolution: Validated assertion outcome from Playwright pass status and explicit post-approval UI/output assertions in spec plus trace evidence.

commandsRun.command: npx playwright test tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts --grep "approve path completes with expected output evidence" --reporter=list
commandsRun.observation: Targeted approval approve-path test passed (1 passed).
Discovery intact: 4 tests found in artifact-approval.e2e.ts, including VAL-PW-006 case.

commandsRun.command: npx playwright test tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts --grep "approve path completes with expected output evidence" --reporter=list --trace on
commandsRun.observation: Targeted test passed again and produced trace artifact evidence.

notes: Validation stayed within mission boundaries (Playwright flow on ports 3100/3101, no Docker).
Evidence confirms approve-path completion is validated by explicit output/content checks, not only disappearance of approval controls.
